name: m1_short_kv_secret
description: F-06 regression — a short key=value secret (pwd=cat, value < 4 chars) is a secret because the KEY is an explicit credential keyword. It must be redacted (kv_secret) and never reach persistence; over-redaction of short values is acceptable. Guards the {4,}->+ fix in redactors.kv_secret.

payload.note: logged in with pwd=cat then started the run
